scripts.test: pnpm --dir docs test && pnpm --filter create-rootward test
scripts.build: pnpm --dir docs build && pnpm --filter create-rootward build
scripts.smoke:creator: rm -rf temporary && node packages/create-rootward/dist/bin.mjs typescript temporary/smoke-tool --cli-name smoke-tool --package-name smoke-tool --json >/dev/null && rm -rf temporary
scripts.check: pnpm versions:check && pnpm templates:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm pack:check && pnpm smoke:creator
